meaning: v.(使)融化,(使)熔化,使软化,使感动
examples: The snow was beginning to melt.
As the climate warms (up) the ice caps will melt.
The ice is beginning to melt.
As the snows melt in the French Alps, a network of via ferratas (climbing routes) opens up.
Via Facebook, The Melt offered a secret password to fans of the sandwich shop.
